description: Email cites a one-off best-week revenue figure as if it were the run-rate — material omission. Should fail MISL-002.
text:
Hi friend,

A quick milestone update.

Last week the Brookvale hub turned over $48,000 in retail and box revenue. That's a record. It puts us on a $2.5M annualised revenue line — a number we never thought we'd hit this fast.

If the run-rate excites you, the chance to own a piece of FarmThru opens on Birchal on 23 June 2026.

Sarah & the FarmThru team

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
